title: zeltnera stricta
intro: Zeltnera stricta, also known as strict prairie gentian, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the prairies of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zeltnera stricta include its ability to treat coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Zeltnera stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
